creator: Trond.Endrestol@ximalas.info
text:
I have strong objections against part of r301295.
The commit log claims to have removed a blank line.
This is false.

The removed line contains the final two words of the comment on the preceeding line:

daily_ntpd_avoid_congestion="YES"                       # Avoid congesting
                                                        # leapfile sources

Please reinstate the lost line, or please add the final two words to line 139.
